name: opendock-figma-ultrawork-quality-gate
description: Run the Figma Ultrawork local presence gate before final handoff.
manualFallback: If hooks are not active, run `opendock verify-hook opendock/figma-ultrawork .opendock/harness/opendock__figma-ultrawork/check.mjs` manually before final response. Full canvas review still requires a node-specific Figma URL through Figma MCP.
